function getStatus() view returns (uint8 currentState, bool buyerOk, bool sellerOk, uint64 deliveryDeadline, uint64 confirmEndsAt)
function terms() view returns (address buyer, address seller, address token, uint256 amount, uint64 deliveryDeadline, uint64 confirmWindow, bytes32 termsHash)
event Accepted(address indexed party, bool isBuyer)
event Deposited(address indexed buyer, uint256 amount)
event Released(address indexed seller, uint256 amount)
event Refunded(address indexed buyer, uint256 amount)
